zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasin Chichester於1426年出生在英國戴文皮爾頓時，她的父親Sir John Chichester41歲，母親Alice Wotton24歲。她於大約1435年與John Cockworthy在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1477年11月29日在英國戴文亞斯可姆享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasin Chichester于1426年出生在英国戴文皮爾頓时，她的父亲Sir John Chichester41岁，母亲Alice Wotton24岁。她于大约1435年与John Cockworthy在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1477年11月29日在英国戴文亞斯可姆享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chichester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Chichester in Sussex, probably named with the Old English personal name Cissa + Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort’. (Cissa is attested as the name of a historical person; it is of uncertain etymology.) Alternatively, the first element may be an Old English word cisse ‘gravelly feature’.

variants.name: Chidester
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Chichester  . It is not found in English records.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasin
meanings: A female name derived from Thomas

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasin Chichester was born in 1426, in Pilton, Devon, England, her father, Sir John Chichester, was 41 and her mother, Alice Wotton, was 24. She married John Cockworthy about 1435, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 November 1477, in Yarnscombe, Devon, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasin Chichester est née en 1426, à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Chichester, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Wotton, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Cockworthy environ 1435, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 novembre 1477, à Yarnscombe, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasin Chichester 1426 in Pilton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Chichester 41 und ihre Mutter Alice Wotton 24. Sie hat um 1435 in Devon, England John Cockworthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. November 1477 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Yarnscombe, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasin Chichester è nata il nel 1426 nel Pilton, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir John Chichester, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Wotton, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Cockworthy circa 1435, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1477, nel Yarnscombe, Devon, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasin Chichesterが1426年にイギリスデボンピルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Chichesterは41歳，母Alice Wottonは24歳であった。約1435年にイギリスデボンでJohn Cockworthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1477年11月29日にイギリスデボンヤーンスコンベで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasin Chichester(이)가 1426년 영국 데폰 피턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Chichester(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Wotton(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 데폰에서 John Cockworthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1477년 11월 29일 영국 데폰 야른스코브에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Raleigh, Devon, England: Farleigh, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasin Chichester nasceu em 1426, em Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Chichester, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Wotton, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cockworthy aproximadamente 1435, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1477, em Yarnscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasin Chichester родилась в 1426 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Chichester было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Wotton, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cockworthy около 1435 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 ноября 1477 г. в местности ярнскомб, девон, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasin Chichester nació en 1426, en Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Chichester, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Wotton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Cockworthy aproximadamente 1435, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1477, en Yarnscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
